notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly hits a grand slam (4) to left center field. Seiya Suzuki scores. Ian Happ scores. Matt Shaw scores.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez singles on a line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango, deflected by shortstop Andrés Giménez. Justin Dean scores.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto pops out softly to second baseman Davis Schneider.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw reaches on a fielder's choice. Ian Happ to 2nd. Ian Happ advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Davis Schneider.
